001package edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.service.respository;
002
003import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
004import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.dao.DigSiteSquareDao;
005import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.DigSiteSquare;
006import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.type.DigSiteSquareState;
007import jakarta.inject.Inject;
008import java.util.Collection;
009import java.util.List;
010import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
011
012/**
013 * Implementation of {@link DigSiteSquareRepository} that delegates to the corresponding DAO for
014 * database operations.
015 */
016public class DigSiteSquareRepositoryImpl implements DigSiteSquareRepository {
017
018  private final DigSiteSquareDao digSiteSquareDao;
019
020  /**
021   * Constructs a DigSiteSquareRepositoryImpl with the specified DAO.
022   *
023   * @param digSiteSquareDao DAO for database operations.
024   */
025  @Inject
026  DigSiteSquareRepositoryImpl(DigSiteSquareDao digSiteSquareDao) {
027    this.digSiteSquareDao = digSiteSquareDao;
028  }
029
030  @Override
031  public LiveData<List<DigSiteSquare>> getAllByGridId(long gridId) {
032    return digSiteSquareDao.selectByGridId(gridId);
033  }
034
035  @Override
036  public CompletableFuture<List<Long>> insertBatch(Collection<DigSiteSquare> squares) {
037    return CompletableFuture.supplyAsync(() -> digSiteSquareDao.insert(squares));
038  }
039
040  @Override
041  public CompletableFuture<Integer> update(DigSiteSquare square) {
042    return CompletableFuture.supplyAsync(() -> digSiteSquareDao.update(square));
043  }
044
045  @Override
046  public CompletableFuture<Integer> updateBatch(Collection<DigSiteSquare> squares) {
047    return CompletableFuture.supplyAsync(() -> digSiteSquareDao.update(squares));
048  }
049
050  @Override
051  public CompletableFuture<Void> updateStateByCoordinates(long gridId, int x, int y,
052      DigSiteSquareState state) {
053    return CompletableFuture.runAsync(() -> {
054      DigSiteSquare square = digSiteSquareDao.selectByCoordinates(gridId, x, y);
055      if (square != null) {
056        square.setState(state);
057        digSiteSquareDao.update(square);
058      }
059    });
060  }
061
062  @Override
063  public CompletableFuture<DigSiteSquareState> getStateByCoordinates(long gridId, int x, int y) {
064    return CompletableFuture.supplyAsync(() -> {
065      DigSiteSquare square = digSiteSquareDao.selectByCoordinates(gridId, x, y);
066      return square != null ? square.getState() : null;
067    });
068  }
069}
